sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n43017" key="e)su/nhken" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐσύνηκεν</orth>, <tns opt="n" TEIform="tns">aor. 1</tns> with double augm. of <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">συνίημι.</foreign> </entryFree>
